forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email — we'll send a password reset link.
forgot.emailSentText: Check your inbox. Open the reset link to set a new password.
forgot.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgot.errUserNotFound: No account exists with this email.
forgot.errTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again later.

enterCode.noEmailText: Start again from Forgot password and enter your email.
enterCode.heading: Check your email
enterCode.body: We sent a reset link to your email. Click it to set a new password.
enterCode.note: Note: check spam/promotions. The link may expire after a while.

reset.successText: Sign in with your new password.
reset.errReset: Reset failed. Request a new link.
reset.errWeak: Password is too weak. Choose a stronger one.
reset.errInvalidLink: Link expired or invalid. Request reset again.
reset.invalidBody: Open this page using the reset link from your email, or request a new reset.
reset.expiredBody: Enter your email again to get a new reset link.

logout.confirmText: Do you want to log out from the admin panel?

generate.title: QR tag generator
generate.subtitle: Separate print designs for bike and car. PDF download: one tag per A4 page — ready for press or home printing.
generate.previewHint: Preview below. Download PDF for printing.
generate.emptyHint: Choose a type, enter a quantity, then generate.

car.label: Car

all.title: All QR codes

all.filterHint: If you pick a month without a year, the current year is used. Pick a month before choosing a day.
all.noResults: No QR codes match this filter.

myPurchases.subtitle: Validity is counted from each successful payment. When it expires you can renew by purchasing again — added to cart.
myPurchases.empty: No paid orders yet. After you buy a product, validity will appear here.
myPurchases.renewNote: A new period will run from the date payment is confirmed.

hero.heading: Protect Your Vehicle with Smart QR Tags
hero.subheading: Scan the QR to quickly reach the vehicle owner when needed.

items: Instant owner contact via QR scan
No app required (works with any phone camera)
Works for bike, car and more

aboutPage.title: About QR Tag System
aboutPage.intro: QR Tag System is a smart solution that makes your vehicle safer and better connected. By simply scanning a QR code, anyone can quickly contact the vehicle owner in parking or emergency situations.
aboutPage.mission: To solve everyday problems using simple, effective technology.
aboutPage.vision: To build a smart vehicle ecosystem in Bangladesh.
aboutPage.story: It started with a simple idea—to solve real-life parking and vehicle communication problems. Today, that idea has grown into a practical solution helping people every day.
aboutPage.whyIntro: Vehicle communication is now smarter, faster, and easier.
points: Instant contact with the owner via QR scan
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Simple, secure and practical for daily vehicle safety.

contactPage.heading: Get in Touch
contactPage.subheading: We are always here for you.
contactPage.leadText: For support, orders, business queries, or urgent issues, send us a message and our team will respond.
contactPage.name: Name

policies.termsBody: Use responsibly. Service misuse is prohibited.
policies.privacyBody: We do not publicly expose personal data.

faq.q: Will phone numbers be publicly visible after scanning?
faq.a: No. A secure contact flow is used.
Yes. Internet is required to access the scanned link.

faq.q: Does it work on all phones?
faq.a: Yes. It is compatible with modern smartphone cameras.
